desc: entries[scale][code] = lowercase hex f32 bits of the value dequantize_row_nvfp4 produces for element code (0..15) under UE4M3 scale byte (0..255). Each entry driven by a real DLL call on a uniform crafted block (d[0..3]=scale, all qs nibbles=code); harness asserts all 64 outputs identical. kvalues (kvalues_mxfp4, ggml-common.h) included for reference.
nibble_probe_desc: blocks with distinct per-sub-block scales d=[0x08,0x38,0x40,0x48] (d=0.5*2^-6*... see ue4m3_table) and position-dependent qs patterns; expected = 64 f32 outputs (hex, element order 0..63) from dequantize_row_nvfp4. Pin layout: sub-block s owns qs[s*8..s*8+7]; LOW nibble of qs[s*8+j] = element s*16+j, HIGH nibble = element s*16+8+j.
